response.justification: While Bogdan is an excellent all-around software engineer with 18+ years of experience and strong modern full-stack capabilities, he does not meet the core technical requirements of this role. His C++ experience is minimal and over a decade old (6 months at National Instruments in 2014–2015). The position requires a seasoned C++ developer with recent expertise in systems programming, embedded systems, and industrial automation—areas where his recent career (Node.js, TypeScript, web/cloud platforms) shows no substantive background. Additionally, critical domain knowledge (IEC 62443 standards, MQTT, industrial protocols, secure development lifecycle) is not evident in the resume.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (18+ years) with demonstrated mastery of testing, TDD, and code quality practices
Strong architectural thinking and ability to design scalable systems, evidenced by open-source projects and work with high-throughput infrastructure (Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/second)
Proven mentoring and technical leadership capability through workshops, code katas, and teaching initiatives
concerns: C++ development experience is minimal and severely dated (last significant C++ work in 2014–2015); recent career focused on Node.js, TypeScript, and web/cloud platforms
No demonstrated background in industrial automation, IoT, embedded systems, or on-premises platform solutions
No evidence of security standards expertise (SDL, IEC 62443), cybersecurity focus, or experience with industrial protocols (MQTT, Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA)

key_factors.factor: Industrial automation and cybersecurity domain knowledge
General software engineering and mentoring excellence
